titleStmt.title: SII 15.152: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 152. (B.K. No. 108 of 1929-30.) MUTTIGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab near the Rudragaṇṭi-Rāmaliṅga temple.

This is dated in the 8th regnal year of the king, Paridhāvi, Śrāvaṇa śu. puṇṇami, Thursday, corresponding to 1192 A.D., July 26. The weekday, however, was Sunday. This date pushes back the commencement of Bhillama's reign by three years.
It records the gift of income derived from the baṇṇige-deṟe tax on the god's garden to the god Tikēśvara by the Two Hundred Mahājanas (of Muttage).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bhillama dēvavaruṣada 8 neya paridhāvi saṁvatsarada srāvaThe letter ma is written above the line.
ṇa sudha puṁṇnami brahaspativāradalu śrī tikēsvaradēvara
pavitrārōhaṇakke mūnūrbbaru baṁdu kuḷḷirdu dēvargge na
maskāraṁ māḍi prasāda pavitra vīḷayamaṁ koṁḍu dēvakāryyamaṁ kaṁ
ḍu karaṁ mecci Ī dēvara tōṁṭada baṁṇnigedeṟe suṁkama sarbbanamasyavāgi dhā
rāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . Ī dharmakidanārittareṁdavare narakakiḷida
Digital edition of SII 15.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
